falsifiers_triggered: Information-theoretic PGM capacity is not an efficient algorithm without an explicit collective measurement and decoder.

records.interpretation: Single transpositions are a control ensemble with visible classical structure; PGM capacity here does not support GI/code-equivalence speedup claims.
records.required_next_step: Keep as a calibration row only.

records.interpretation: A PGM-style distinguishability threshold exists only after many copies, and an explicit PGM has superpolynomial description in the hidden-involution ensemble size. This is measurement-design proof debt, not an algorithm.
